task_completion.description: Verify StudioTax 2024 is open and the taxpayer name is set to Marcus Chen-Williams.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 application window is visible with 'Marcus Chen-Williams' entered in the personal information section or visible in the active return tab.

task_completion.description: Verify spouse information is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Marital status is set to Married or Common-law, spouse's name 'Elena' is entered, and spouse's net income of $68,000 is visible in the spouse/linked return section.

task_completion.description: Verify the Disability Tax Credit (T2201) is claimed for the taxpayer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Disability Tax Credit section, checkbox, or T2201 form is filled out or checked, indicating the taxpayer is eligible for the disability amount.

task_completion.description: Verify T4A slip is added with the correct RDSP withdrawal details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: T4A data entry screen shows Box 28 with a value of $4,500. Box 131 ($3,000) should be excluded or explicitly marked as non-taxable if visible.

task_completion.description: Verify medical expenses are itemized and entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Medical expenses worksheet or form shows entries totaling $14,280.

task_completion.description: Verify the return is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or the StudioTax title bar shows the file saved as 'marcus_chen_williams.24t' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual StudioTax 2024 application windows being interacted with, rather than a text editor or terminal modifying a .24t file directly.

integrity.description: Data was entered into the appropriate tax forms rather than typed into a dummy window.
integrity.visual_evidence: Values like $68,000, $4,500, and $14,280 appear in the correct StudioTax input fields (e.g., T4A, Medical Expenses worksheet, Spouse info).

integrity.description: The file was saved using the StudioTax save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The StudioTax interface shows the save operation (e.g., File -> Save menu, or the title bar updating to the new filename) rather than a terminal command creating the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer Name: Marcus Chen-Williams. Spouse: Elena (Net income: $68,000). Disability Tax Credit (T2201) must be activated. T4A must include Box 28 (taxable RDSP) with $4,500. Box 131 ($3,000 non-taxable) should be excluded. Medical expenses must total $14,280. Output file must be saved exactly as C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\marcus_chen_williams.24t.
